name: MD. Mehedi Hasan Ovi
role: Software Engineering Undergraduate · Daffodil International University
intro: I'm an undergraduate Software Engineering student who enjoys turning ideas into working applications. Currently building my foundation in programming, databases, and full-stack web development.

paragraphs: I'm an undergraduate student in the Department of Software Engineering at Daffodil International University. My interest in software started with wanting to understand how the apps and systems I used every day actually worked — and grew into a habit of building my own.

I'm currently focused on strengthening my core programming and problem-solving skills through coursework and hands-on projects, including my capstone project, an Employee Management System. I enjoy the process of taking a real-world problem, designing a system for it, and seeing it work end to end.
Outside of coursework, I'm steadily expanding into full-stack web development, and I'm always open to learning from real projects, internships, and collaborations.

projects.title: Employee Management System
projects.desc: A system built to manage employee records, streamline day-to-day HR operations, and organize company data efficiently — developed as my final-year capstone project.

projects.title: More Projects
projects.desc: New projects will be added here as I build them.

contact.heading: Let's connect.
contact.desc: Open to internships, collaborations, and opportunities to learn and build. Feel free to reach out.
